name: @suite/referral-engine-core
description: Framework-agnostic core of the Referral Intelligence Engine: form runtime (branching, visibility, repeat groups, validation, completeness), invitation service (tokens, hashing, validation state machine), QR generation, and canonical Source creation. No AI, no UI, no database - pure tested logic consumed by the Phase 1 application (decisions.md D-020 Layer 3 core).
